_doc: Example configuration for the cowork-intelligence Graphify integration. Copy to ~/.claude/graphify-config.json and adapt to your real Graphify CLI signature. Discover the CLI with `graphify --help` first — the command_args below are placeholders you must replace.

user._doc: Cross-project graph. Holds notes, snippets, transverse knowledge.

concours-eu._doc: Project-scoped graph for the concours-eu repo. Matches `basename $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)`.
